product_name: Notification for New Arrival of Timeseries Data
data_coverage_summary: Insights Hub drives smart manufacturing through the industrial Internet of Things. Gain actionable insights with asset and operational data and improve your processes. Published API scope is limited to event notifications about telemetry arrival.
buyer_guidance: Use this API when the integration needs event-driven awareness that new telemetry has landed in Insights Hub.
overview: Insights Hub drives smart manufacturing through the industrial Internet of Things. Gain actionable insights with asset and operational data and improve your processes. This surface exists to notify downstream consumers about newly arrived telemetry rather than to manage the source records themselves. Asset data is Un-Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Un-Supported.

available_data.description: Published API scope is limited to event notifications about telemetry arrival.

ingest_considerations: This surface includes telemetry or event-oriented payloads that should be modeled for time-based ingestion or monitoring workflows.
The published surface is read-oriented for the covered domain and should not be advertised as a command or writeback API.
The evidence for this record comes from the published Siemens overview and product summary; the public artifact did not expose a simple path list during generation.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for Notification for New Arrival of Timeseries Data.
